pre_game.message: Hey E, I'm B — nice to meet you. Excited for the game; what made you join? I'm hoping to bring home some money for my folks.
Hey B, I’m E — nice to meet you. I joined because I could use the money to help my family and cover some bills; excited to play and hoping we both do well.
Nice to meet you, E — I'm in the same boat trying to help my folks. Good luck; any plan for the game?
I’m planning to read the room first — watch how people behave, try cooperating early if it seems safe, then adapt and play smart; good luck to you.
Solid plan — I’m with you. Let’s watch the room and, if it seems safe, try cooperating early and keep each other informed.
Agreed — let's stay flexible, share what we see, and adapt if things change. Good luck!
Sounds great — I’ll keep you posted on anything useful. Let’s do our best and bring home some money. Good luck!
Thanks, B — I appreciate it. I’ll keep you updated too. Let’s watch the room and bring this home. Good luck!
Thanks, E — I appreciate it. I’ll keep you posted too; let’s watch the room and bring this home. Good luck!
Thanks, B — I’ll keep you posted too. Let’s watch the room, stay flexible, and bring this home. Good luck!
Thanks, E — I’ll do the same. If I see anything important I’ll tell you; let’s stay sharp and bring this home. Good luck!
Thanks, B — appreciate it. I’ll do the same; keep me posted. Good luck!
Will do — I'll keep you posted if anything important comes up. Good luck!
Thanks, B — I appreciate it; I’ll do the same. Stay sharp and good luck!
Thanks, E — you too. I’ll share anything useful; stay sharp. Good luck!
Thanks, B — you too. I’ll share anything useful and keep you posted. Stay sharp. Good luck!
Thanks, E — same here. Keep me posted on anything big and stay sharp.
